channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Toncoin stares at a break or a bust: $1.61 resistance vs $1.23 support. Can the rally hold or collapse? 💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260412-price-prediction-ton-targets-161-breakout-as-technical-indicators #crypto #TON #Trading
